summary: Reaction Reversion State Fix - All 5 required features verified working via Playwright tests. Global Reset is functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js line 410: handleShakaTapToggle correctly sets liked:false when clearing non-Shaka reaction (Global Reset)
Feed.js line 526: handleReaction sets liked:false when adding any new emoji (nullifies Shaka-liked state)
Feed.js lines 28-76: ReactionIcon correctly checks shakaIsChecked = isLiked && !hasNonShakaReaction for grayscale logic
Spring animation (cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275)) applied consistently for smooth transitions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 reaction reversion features verified working: (1) Select Fire → shows 🔥, (2) Tap Fire → GRAYSCALE Shaka, (3) New emoji nullifies liked state, (4) Tap unchecked → COLORED Shaka, (5) Tap checked → GRAYSCALE Shaka. Global Reset feature working correctly.

test_1_select_fire_shows_fire_emoji.description: Select Fire emoji from menu → Icon shows 🔥

test_2_tap_fire_reverts_to_grayscale.description: Tap active Fire emoji → Icon reverts to GRAYSCALE Shaka (unchecked)

test_3_new_emoji_nullifies_liked_state.description: When selecting new emoji, liked state is set to false

test_4_tap_unchecked_becomes_checked.description: Tap unchecked Shaka → becomes checked (colored) Shaka

test_5_tap_checked_becomes_unchecked.description: Tap checked Shaka → becomes unchecked (grayscale) Shaka

test_methodology.authentication: Set user data in localStorage directly
test_methodology.state_detection: Checked img element for grayscale filter OR span.text-2xl for emoji

code_verification.handleShakaTapToggle_line_410: Sets liked:false when clearing non-Shaka reaction
code_verification.handleReaction_line_526: Sets liked:false when adding new emoji
